user_goal: 在 B014 经验签收（2020 max DD -4.76% / 2022 max DD -1.66%）后，针对其跨策略对比发现的 'B013 在非危机期间绝对收益让出给 60/40' 现象做最小研究批次：给 B013 加 regime_activation_policy 参数（always_on 默认 / only_non_normal / only_crisis），让 L1 200-SMA 趋势过滤按当前 regime label 条件启用；L2 inverse-vol + 8% target 与 L3 crisis 减半不变；默认保持 B013 现状 bit-for-bit；在 B014 真实 snapshot 上跨 policy 与 B006/B010/60-40 对比，看是否缩窄 absolute-return gap。**不修改 B013 strategy code 外的任何文件**（包括 B010/B011 等），保留 fixture/mock-first 默认 CI、no-live/no-secret-in-strategy/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-14 B015 planning: B014 done wrap-up confirmed empirical stress PASS (2020 DD -4.76% / 2022 DD -1.66%) but cross-strategy comparison surfaced B013 underperformance vs static 60/40 in calm window (126726 vs 158978 in 2020-06..2022-12). User selected B015 'regime-aware activation' as the small-scope research follow-up. Decisions captured: (1) single new config field regime_activation_policy with three values (always_on default / only_non_normal / only_crisis); (2) gate applies only to L1 trend gating; L2 inverse-vol + 8% target and L3 crisis halving unchanged; (3) default always_on must reproduce B013 signoff bit-for-bit on synthetic fixture (backwards-compat hard requirement); (4) comparative backtest runs on B014 real snapshot for all three policies + B006 + B010 + 60/40; (5) B015 mutates only files inside trade/strategies/regime_adaptive/ (config + trend_gating + backtest) plus tests + new report — B010/B011/B012/B013 spec & strategy code untouched; (6) Master Portfolio regime_adaptive sleeve registration uses default always_on so B011 invariants preserved automatically; (7) no broker/AI/paper/live language anywhere. Wrote B015 spec and features.json (6 features: F001-F005 generator + F006 codex; mixed batch). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-14 F002 done. trend_gating.py grew should_l1_gate_run(regime_label, policy) covering the 9-cell truth table (always_on True everywhere; only_non_normal True on BEAR/CRISIS; only_crisis True on CRISIS only) plus invalid-policy + invalid-regime ValueErrors. New build_policy_skipped_trend_result(records, config, signal_date) constructs a TrendGatingResult that marks every asset's mask=True with reason GATE_REASON_POLICY_SKIPPED for non-defensive entries (defensive still tagged DEFENSIVE_PASS); gated_symbols=(); SGOV routing intact. New constant GATE_REASON_POLICY_SKIPPED. backtest.py now calls detect_regime FIRST (move was safe — detect_regime depends only on records + previous_effective_weights + config + signal_date, not on the current period's gating output), then derives l1_active and either runs apply_trend_gating or build_policy_skipped_trend_result. RegimeAdaptivePeriodResult gained l1_active: bool. Added 11 new tests (9-cell truth table parametrized + 2 ValueError negatives + ungated builder + 4 backtest workflow integration cases covering always_on default, only_non_normal+NORMAL, only_crisis+NORMAL, always_on across multiple regimes). Full repo: 389 tests + ruff + mypy 42 files + compileall all green. B011 sleeve registration test still passes (default always_on preserves prior path). Moving to F003 (real-snapshot three-policy comparative backtest harness).
